rationale: The citing-paper note explicitly includes “preference minorities” and “niche product purchasing” as focal constructs and says the study “links to preference-minority research” when identifying harbingers via niche purchases. The cited paper’s core contribution is precisely the preference-minority mechanism and stronger niche-brand effects, making it a plausible conceptual/mechanism source rather than a generic mention. Given this thematic overlap and direct DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
